  let n = toks1.len()

  while i < n
    let a_str = match toks1.get(i)
    when Some(s)

    when None

    end
    let b_str = match toks2.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""

    let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
    when Some(v)
